elements.title: DETECT
elements.text: Possible cybersecurity attacks and compromises are found and analyzed

elements.title: GOVERN
elements.text: The organization's cybersecurity risk management strategy, expectations, and policy are established, communicated, and monitored

elements.title: IDENTIFY
elements.text: The organization's current cybersecurity risks are understood

elements.title: PROTECT
elements.text: Safeguards to manage the organization's cybersecurity risks are used

elements.title: RECOVER
elements.text: Assets and operations affected by a cybersecurity incident are restored

elements.title: RESPOND
elements.text: Actions regarding a detected cybersecurity incident are taken
